expectations.text: Review references 'v18/dev' as the target branch (not 'main')
expectations.evidence: The review does not mention 'v18/dev' or any target branch at all. It discusses the v18 context implicitly but never references the target branch.

expectations.text: Review discusses the behavioral impact of changing the default payload type
expectations.evidence: The review focuses on stale documentation (Minimal enum remark) and the Obsolete removal version compliance. It does not discuss the behavioral impact of the default payload type change on existing installations.
Review is 10 lines, well under the 150 line limit.

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues (formatting, whitespace, naming conventions, comment grammar, code style preferences) unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: Both findings are substantive: stale documentation that is misleading and Obsolete attribute compliance. No cosmetic issues flagged.

expectations.text: Does NOT flag the ~30 builder extension methods with Legacy defaults (pre-existing, not changed in the PR)
expectations.evidence: The review does not mention builder extension methods at all.

expectations.text: Flags stale WebhookSettings.cs docs as a side-effect of the constant value change
expectations.evidence: The review flags the stale remark on the Minimal enum value in WebhookPayloadType.cs, but does NOT flag the stale WebhookSettings.cs documentation. Finding #1 is about WebhookPayloadType.Minimal remarks, not WebhookSettings.cs.

expectations.text: Identifies affected consumers outside the PR (WebhookSettings, UmbracoBuilder, or WebhookEventCollectionBuilderExtensions)
expectations.evidence: The review does not identify any affected consumers outside the PR. It focuses on the files within the diff only.
